calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kale Heiman, via Zoom, for Barika K. Culberson, Petitioner.

The court summarizes the previous calling and Pharoah Thomas' appearance to advise that he objected to the instant petition. The court provided Mr. Thomas a deadline of Nov-28-2022 to formally file and serve his objection. No objection has been filed and no one appeared to object. Accordingly, there being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Mar-30-2022 is admitted to probate. Barika K. Culberson is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-29-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-24-2022 Continued To Dec-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexandra Coleman and Kale Heiman, via Zoom, for Barika K. Culberson, Petitioner; Pharoah Thomas, via Zoom, in propria persona, Objector.

Mr. Thomas offers testimony regarding his appearance this morning to object to the court admitting the will via the instant petition. The court advises Mr. Thomas that his objection is not before the court this morning as he will need to formally file his objection in writing. Ms. Coleman and Ms. Heiman report that they were not aware of any objections to the instant petition and advise that they are willing to file written responses. The court reiterates the objection process to Mr. Thomas especially regarding formally filing his objection and serving the objection on counsel. The court advises Mr. Thomas to consider seeking legal counsel to assist him with the process.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Dec-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Mr. Thomas is instructed to formally file his objection in writing by no later than Nov-28-2022 otherwise, the court will consider his objection waived. Mr. Thomas is reminded that any objection filed is to be properly served on counsel. Responses to any objection are to be filed by Dec-12-2022.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Oct-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
